patch.value: Dogfood evidence: pm templates save ... --create-mode progressive fails with unknown option, while pm contracts --action templates-save advertised createMode in schema branch.
Align templates-save Pi contracts with supported CLI flags
Pi contracts and wrapper generated unsupported templates save flags (e.g. createMode) that the CLI rejects.
templates-save contract schema and wrapper only expose/emit flags accepted by pm templates save --help; regression tests cover schema and arg building.
Inspect contracts templates-save branch and run templates save with createMode.
Contracted wrapper parameters map to valid CLI flags.
Wrapper emits unsupported flags and CLI returns unknown_option.
Agent tool invocations can fail despite passing schema validation.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search 'templates save create-mode contracts mismatch' --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new because no active item tracked templates-save createMode/schema parity bug.

value.text: Mismatch observed between pm contracts action schema and templates command help/options.

value.text: Action schema contracts must be constrained per subcommand support,not inherited wholesale from create.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Constrained templates-save schema/wrapper options to supported flags only; removed createMode/schedulePreset/unset/clear* from templates-save action contract and arg emission. Evidence: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/pi-agent-extension.spec.ts (11 passed).

author: codex-agent
